headline: 2 Reasons to Watch AMAT and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: What a time it’s been for Applied Materials. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 89.7%, reaching $605.26 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
